functions.body:
local tmp_payload="" stream_json="" VALID_MESSAGES_JSON="" http_code="" edgecase=0 now_ts="" model_from_file="" payload_size=0 staged_b64="" tmp_b64="" content_val="" msgs="" msgs_from_file=""
tmp_payload="$(_mktemp_in_dir "$RUN_TMPDIR" payload.XXXXXX.json 2>/dev/null || _tmpf file "$RUN_TMPDIR" payload.json)"
if is_truthy "${STREAM_MODE:-0}"; then
  stream_json=true
else
  stream_json=false
fi
case "${stream_json:-}" in
  true|false) ;;
  1) stream_json=true ;;
  0) stream_json=false ;;
  *) stream_json=false ;;
esac
if ! printf '%s' "${TEMPERATURE:-}" | grep -qE '^[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$'; then
  log_warn "ARGS" "invalid TURE value '${TEMPERATURE:-}'; defaulting to 1.0"
  TURE="1.0"
fi
if ! printf '%s' "${MAX_TOKENS:-}" | grep -qE '^[0-9]+$'; then
  log_warn "ARGS" "invalid MAX_TOKENS value '${MAX_TOKENS:-}'; defaulting to 4096"
  MAX_TOKENS="4096"
fi
VALID_MESSAGES_JSON=""
if [ -n "${JSON_INPUT:-}" ] && is_valid_json_string "${JSON_INPUT}"; then
  msgs="$(printf '%s' "$JSON_INPUT" | jq -c '.messages // empty' 2>/dev/null || true)"
  if [ -n "$msgs" ]; then
    VALID_MESSAGES_JSON="$msgs"
  else
    content_val="$(printf '%s' "$JSON_INPUT" | jq -r '.content // .prompt // empty' 2>/dev/null || true)"
    if [ -n "$content_val" ]; then
      VALID_MESSAGES_JSON="$(jq -c -n --arg content "$content_val" '[{role:"user",content:$content}]')"
    fi
  fi
fi
if [ -z "$VALID_MESSAGES_JSON" ] && [ -n "${MESSAGES_JSON:-}" ] && is_valid_json_string "${MESSAGES_JSON:-}"; then
  VALID_MESSAGES_JSON="${MESSAGES_JSON}"
fi
if [ -z "$VALID_MESSAGES_JSON" ] && [ -n "${BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE:-}" ] && is_valid_json_file "${BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE}"; then
  msgs_from_file="$(jq -c '.messages // []' "$BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  if printf '%s' "$msgs_from_file" | jq -e 'type=="array" and (length>0)' >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    if [ -n "${CONTENT:-}" ]; then
      VALID_MESSAGES_JSON="$(printf '%s' "$msgs_from_file" | jq -c --arg content "$CONTENT" '. + [{role:"user", content:$content}]' 2>/dev/null || printf '%s' "$msgs_from_file")"
    else
      VALID_MESSAGES_JSON="$msgs_from_file"
    fi
  fi
fi
if [ -z "$VALID_MESSAGES_JSON" ] && [ -n "${CONTENT:-}" ]; then
  VALID_MESSAGES_JSON="$(jq -c -n --arg content "$CONTENT" '[{role:"user",content:$content}]')"
fi
if [ -z "$VALID_MESSAGES_JSON" ]; then
  VALID_MESSAGES_JSON='[{"role":"user","content":""}]'
  log_warn "PAYLOAD" "MESSAGES_JSON invalid or missing; using fallback single empty user message"
fi
if ! printf '%s' "$VALID_MESSAGES_JSON" | jq -e 'type=="array" and (length>0)' >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log_warn "PAYLOAD" "VALID_MESSAGES_JSON is empty or not an array; using fallback single empty user message"
  VALID_MESSAGES_JSON='[{"role":"user","content":""}]'
fi
if [ -n "${SYSTEM_PROMPT:-}" ]; then
  VALID_MESSAGES_JSON="$(jq -n --argjson messages "$VALID_MESSAGES_JSON" --arg sys "$SYSTEM_PROMPT" '[{role:"system", content:$sys}] + $messages' 2>/dev/null || jq -n --arg role "system" --arg content "${SYSTEM_PROMPT:-}" --argjson messages "$VALID_MESSAGES_JSON" '{messages:([{role:$role,content:$content}] + $messages) }')"
fi
if [ -z "${MODEL:-}" ] && [ -n "${BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE:-}" ] && is_valid_json_file "${BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE}"; then
  model_from_file="$(jq -r '.model // .provider?.model // empty' "$BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  if [ -n "$model_from_file" ]; then
    MODEL="$model_from_file"
    if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
      log_info "PAYLOAD" "MODEL set from BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE: ${MODEL}"
    fi
  fi
fi
if ! jq -n --arg model "${MODEL:-}" --argjson stream "$stream_json" --arg ture "$TEMPERATURE" --arg max_tokens "$MAX_TOKENS" \
     --argjson messages "$(printf '%s' "$VALID_MESSAGES_JSON")" \
     '{model:$model, stream:$stream, temperature:($ture|tonumber), max_tokens:($max_tokens|tonumber), messages:$messages }' >"$tmp_payload" 2>/dev/null; then
  log_error "PAYLOAD" "jq failed to build payload; tmp_payload not created"
  rm -f "$tmp_payload" 2>/dev/null || true
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
if [ ! -s "$tmp_payload" ]; then
  log_error "PAYLOAD" "tmp_payload is empty after jq; aborting"
  rm -f "$tmp_payload" 2>/dev/null || true
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  payload_size=$(wc -c < "$tmp_payload" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  log_info "PAYLOAD" "tmp_payload path: $tmp_payload size=${payload_size}B"
  log_info "PAYLOAD" "tmp_payload content (head 2000 chars):"
  head -c 2000 "$tmp_payload" >&2 || true
fi
staged_b64=""
if type stage_b64 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  tmp_b64="${tmp_payload}.b64"
  if stage_b64 "$tmp_b64" < "$tmp_payload" 2>/dev/null; then
    staged_b64="$tmp_b64"
    rm -f "$tmp_payload" 2>/dev/null || true
    if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
      log_info "PAYLOAD" "Created base64-staged payload: $staged_b64"
    fi
  else
    if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
      log_warn "PAYLOAD" "stage_b64 failed; using raw JSON payload"
    fi
    rm -f "$tmp_b64" 2>/dev/null || true
  fi
fi
if [ -n "$staged_b64" ]; then
  PAYLOAD="$staged_b64"
else
  PAYLOAD="$tmp_payload"
fi
export PAYLOAD
return 0

local provider_url="${BASH4LLM_PROVIDER_URL:-}"
local api_key="${GROQ_API_KEY:-}"
local http_code="" rc=0 payload_dec="" tmp_resp="" tmp_err=""
enforce_network_policy || return $?
if [ -z "$provider_url" ]; then
  log_error "CALL" "Provider URL not resolved"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_API"
fi
payload_dec="$PAYLOAD"
if [[ "$PAYLOAD" == *.b64 ]]; then
  payload_dec="$(_tmpf file "$RUN_TMPDIR" payload.dec 2>/dev/null)" || return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  if ! b64decode < "$PAYLOAD" > "$payload_dec" 2>/dev/null; then
    log_error "B64DECODE" "Failed to decode staging payload"
    rm -f "$payload_dec" 2>/dev/null || true
    return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  fi
fi
tmp_resp="$(_tmpf file "$RUN_TMPDIR" resp.tmp 2>/dev/null)" || { [ "$payload_dec" != "$PAYLOAD" ] && rm -f "$payload_dec" 2>/dev/null || true; return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"; }
tmp_err="$(_tmpf file "$RUN_TMPDIR" err.tmp 2>/dev/null)" || { rm -f "$tmp_resp" 2>/dev/null || true; [ "$payload_dec" != "$PAYLOAD" ] && rm -f "$payload_dec" 2>/dev/null || true; return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"; }
if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  log_info "CURL" "POST -> $provider_url"
fi
http_code="$(curl "${CURL_BASE_OPTS[@]}" \
  -X POST \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $api_key" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  --data-binary @"$payload_dec" \
  -o "$tmp_resp" \
  -w "%{http_code}" \
  "$provider_url" < /dev/null 2>"$tmp_err")"
rc=$?
if [ "$payload_dec" != "$PAYLOAD" ]; then
  rm -f "$payload_dec" 2>/dev/null || true
fi
if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ]; then
  log_error "CURL" "Network call failed with code $rc"
  cat "$tmp_err" >> "$ERRF" 2>/dev/null || true
  rm -f "$tmp_resp" "$tmp_err" 2>/dev/null || true
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_CURL_FAILED"
fi
if [ -s "$tmp_resp" ]; then
  if mv -f "$tmp_resp" "$RESP" 2>/dev/null; then
    chmod 600 "$RESP" 2>/dev/null || true
  else
    cp -f "$tmp_resp" "$RESP" 2>/dev/null || true
    chmod 600 "$RESP" 2>/dev/null || true
    rm -f "$tmp_resp" 2>/dev/null || true
  fi
else
  rm -f "$tmp_resp" 2>/dev/null || true
fi
rm -f "$tmp_err" 2>/dev/null || true
if [ "$http_code" -lt 200 ] || [ "$http_code" -ge 300 ]; then
  log_error "API" "HTTP Status code: $http_code"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_API"
fi
return 0

local tmp_payload="" provider_url="" resp_raw="" resp_lines="" resp_valid="" resp_chunks="" resp_tmp="" rc=0 stderr_head="" now_ts="" decoded_payload="" finish_reason="" req_id="" edgecase=0 send_payload="" CURL_CMD=() http_code="" json="" content="" resp_size=0 errf_size=0 resp_json_tmp="" p_dir="" api_json="" ui_last=""
local curl_err_log=""
if ! enforce_network_policy >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  if is_truthy "${DRY_RUN:-0}"; then
    if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
      show_payload_head "${PAYLOAD:-}" 200 || true
      log_info "DRYRUN" "DRY-RUN: skipping streaming HTTP call"
    fi
    return 0
  fi
  log_error "NETWORK" "Network calls disabled; aborting streaming request."
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_CURL_FAILED"
fi
if [ -n "${PROVIDER_API_ENV_groq:-}" ] && declare -p "${PROVIDER_API_ENV_groq}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  custom_key_var="${PROVIDER_API_ENV_groq}"
  GROQ_API_KEY="${!custom_key_var:-}"
fi
if [ -z "${GROQ_API_KEY:-}" ] && [ -z "${BASH4LLM_API_KEY:-}" ]; then
  log_error "APIKEY" "GROQ_API_KEY (or BASH4LLM_API_KEY) is not set."
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_NO_API_KEY"
fi
tmp_payload="${BASH4LLM_TMP_PAYLOAD:-${PAYLOAD:-}}"
if [ -z "${tmp_payload:-}" ]; then
  log_error "CALL_STREAM" "no payload file specified (BASH4LLM_TMP_PAYLOAD or PAYLOAD)"
  return 1
fi
if [ ! -s "$tmp_payload" ]; then
  log_error "CALL_STREAM" "Refusing to call curl: payload file is empty or missing: $tmp_payload"
  now_ts="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
  jq -c -n --arg ts "$now_ts" --arg note "empty_payload" '{diagnostic:true, note:$note, time:$ts}' > "${RESP:-$RUN_TMPDIR/resp.json}" 2>/dev/null || true
  return 1
fi
if [ -z "${BASH4LLM_PROVIDER_URL:-}" ]; then
  resolve_provider_url "${PROVIDER:-}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
fi
provider_url="${BASH4LLM_PROVIDER_URL:-}"
if [ -z "${provider_url:-}" ]; then
  log_error "CALL_STREAM" "no provider URL set (BASH4LLM_PROVIDER_URL)"
  now_ts="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
  jq -c -n --arg ts "$now_ts" --arg note "no_provider_url" '{diagnostic:true, note:$note, time:$ts}' > "${RESP:-$RUN_TMPDIR/resp.json}" 2>/dev/null || true
  return 1
fi
resp_raw="$(_tmpf file "$RUN_TMPDIR" resp.raw 2>/dev/null)"
resp_lines="$(_tmpf file "$RUN_TMPDIR" resp.lines 2>/dev/null)"
resp_valid="$(_tmpf file "$RUN_TMPDIR" resp.valid.jsons 2>/dev/null)"
resp_chunks="$(_tmpf file "$RUN_TMPDIR" resp.chunks.json 2>/dev/null)"
curl_err_log="$(_tmpf file "$RUN_TMPDIR" curl_stream.err 2>/dev/null)"
: > "$curl_err_log" 2>/dev/null || true
rm -f "$resp_raw" "$resp_lines" "$resp_valid" "$resp_chunks" 2>/dev/null || true
if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  log_info "CALL_STREAM" "Invoking streaming curl to $provider_url (payload: $tmp_payload)"
fi
decoded_payload="$(_tmpf file "$RUN_TMPDIR" payload.dec 2>/dev/null)" || true
if [[ "$tmp_payload" == *.b64 ]]; then
  if ! b64decode < "$tmp_payload" > "$decoded_payload" 2>"$curl_err_log"; then
    log_error "B64DECODE" "base64 decode failed for payload; see $curl_err_log"
    rm -f "$decoded_payload" "$curl_err_log" 2>/dev/null || true
    return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  fi
  send_payload="$decoded_payload"
else
  send_payload="$tmp_payload"
fi
CURL_CMD=(curl --http1.1 -sS -N)
if [ -n "${CURL_BASE_OPTS[*]:-}" ]; then
  CURL_CMD+=("${CURL_BASE_OPTS[@]}")
fi
CURL_CMD+=( -H "Content-Type: application/json" )
if [ -n "${GROQ_API_KEY:-}" ]; then
  CURL_CMD+=( -H "Authorization: Bearer ${GROQ_API_KEY}" )
elif [ -n "${BASH4LLM_API_KEY:-}" ]; then
  CURL_CMD+=( -H "Authorization: Bearer ${BASH4LLM_API_KEY}" )
fi
"${CURL_CMD[@]}" --data-binary @"$send_payload" "$provider_url" 2> "$curl_err_log" | \
tee "$resp_raw" | \
jq --unbuffered -R -r '
  if startswith("data: ") then
    sub("^data:[[:space:]]*"; "") |
    select(. != "[DONE]") |
    try (fromjson | .choices[0] | (.delta.content // .message.content // "")) catch ""
  else
    try (
      fromjson |
      if .error.message then ("\nAPI Error: " + .error.message)
      elif .message then ("\nAPI Error: " + .message)
      else empty end
    ) catch empty
  fi
'
rc=${PIPESTATUS[0]:-0}
if [ "$rc" -eq 141 ]; then
  rc=0
fi
rm -f "$decoded_payload" 2>/dev/null || true
resp_size=0; [ -f "$resp_raw" ] && resp_size=$(wc -c < "$resp_raw" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
errf_size=0; [ -f "$curl_err_log" ] && errf_size=$(wc -c < "$curl_err_log" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  log_info "CALL_STREAM" "curl rc=${rc} resp_raw_size=${resp_size}B ERRF_size=${errf_size}B"
  if [ -s "$curl_err_log" ]; then
    log_info "CALL_STREAM" "curl stderr (head 400 chars):"
    head -c 400 "$curl_err_log" 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,20p' >&2 || true
  fi
fi
if [ -s "$resp_raw" ]; then
  grep -E '^data:' "$resp_raw" 2>/dev/null | sed -E 's/^data:[[:space:]]*//' > "$resp_lines" 2>/dev/null || true
fi
: > "$resp_valid" 2>/dev/null || true
if [ -f "$resp_lines" ] && [ -s "$resp_lines" ]; then
  while IFS= read -r _line; do
    if printf '%s' "$_line" | jq -e . >/dev/null 2>&1; then
      printf '%s\n' "$_line" >> "$resp_valid"
    fi
  done < "$resp_lines"
fi
if [ -s "$resp_valid" ]; then
  jq -s '.' "$resp_valid" > "$resp_chunks" 2>/dev/null || true
  resp_json_tmp="$(_tmpf file "$RUN_TMPDIR" resp.json 2>/dev/null)"
  jq -c '
    if (length > 0) then
      .[0] as $first |
      .[-1] as $last |
      {
        id: ($last.id // $first.id // "synthetic"),
        object: "chat.completion",
        created: ($last.created // $first.created // 0),
        model: ($last.model // $first.model // "unknown"),
        choices: [{
          index: 0,
          message: {
            role: "assistant",
            content: (map(.choices[]?.delta?.content // .choices[]?.message?.content // "") | join(""))
          },
          finish_reason: ($last.choices[0]?.finish_reason // "stop")
        }],
        usage: ($last.usage // empty)
      }
    else
      {}
    fi
  ' "$resp_chunks" > "$resp_json_tmp" 2>/dev/null || true
else
  resp_json_tmp="$(_tmpf file "$RUN_TMPDIR" resp.json 2>/dev/null)"
  if jq -e . "$resp_raw" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    cp -f "$resp_raw" "$resp_json_tmp" 2>/dev/null || true
  fi
fi
rm -f "$resp_raw" 2>/dev/null || true
rm -f "$resp_lines" 2>/dev/null || true
rm -f "$resp_valid" 2>/dev/null || true
rm -f "$resp_chunks" 2>/dev/null || true
resp_tmp="$resp_json_tmp"
if [ -z "${RESP:-}" ]; then
  RESP="${RUN_TMPDIR%/}/resp.json"
fi
p_dir="$(dirname "$RESP")"
safe_mkdir "$p_dir" 700
if [ -s "$resp_tmp" ]; then
  if [ "${resp_tmp%/}" = "${RESP%/}" ]; then
    chmod 600 "$RESP" 2>/dev/null || true
  else
    if mv -f "$resp_tmp" "${RESP}" 2>/dev/null; then
      chmod 600 "${RESP}" 2>/dev/null || true
    else
      log_error "RESP" "mv failed; writing diagnostic RESP"
      now_ts="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
      stderr_head="$(head -c 200 "${curl_err_log:-/dev/null}" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/"/\\"/g' || true)"
      jq -c -n --arg http "${http_code:-0}" --arg ts "$now_ts" --arg err "$stderr_head" \
        '{diagnostic:true, last_http_status:($http|tonumber), last_time_utc:$ts, stderr_head:$err}' > "${RESP}" 2>/dev/null || true
    fi
  fi
else
  now_ts="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
  stderr_head="$(head -c 200 "${curl_err_log:-/dev/null}" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/"/\\"/g' || true)"
  jq -c -n --arg http "${http_code:-0}" --arg ts "$now_ts" --arg err "$stderr_head" \
        '{diagnostic:true, last_http_status:($http|tonumber), last_time_utc:$ts, stderr_head:$err}' > "${RESP}" 2>/dev/null || printf '{"diagnostic":true,"last_http_status":%s,"last_time_utc":"%s"}\n' "${http_code:-0}" "$now_ts" > "${RESP}"
fi
rm -f "$resp_tmp" 2>/dev/null || true
rm -f "$curl_err_log" 2>/dev/null || true
if ensure_run_tmpdir >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  http_code=200
  finish_reason="$(jq -r '.choices[0]?.finish_reason // empty' "${RESP}" 2>/dev/null || echo "")"
  req_id="$(jq -r '.x_groq?.id // .id // empty' "${RESP}" 2>/dev/null || echo "")"
  edgecase=0
  if [ "${BASH4LLM_EDGE_EMPTY:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then edgecase=1; fi
  now_ts="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
  api_json="$(jq -c -n --argjson http "$http_code" --arg fr "${finish_reason:-}" --argjson edge "$edgecase" --arg id "${req_id:-}" --arg ts "$now_ts" '{last_http_status:$http, last_finish_reason:$fr, last_edgecase_detected:$edge, last_req_id:$id, last_time_utc:$ts}')"
  ui_state_write "last_api.json" "$api_json" || { if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then log_warn "UI_STATE" "failed to write last_api.json (streaming)"; fi; }
fi
return "${rc:-0}"

if [ -n "${PROVIDER_API_ENV_groq:-}" ] && declare -p "${PROVIDER_API_ENV_groq}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  custom_key_var="${PROVIDER_API_ENV_groq}"
  GROQ_API_KEY="${!custom_key_var:-}"
fi
if [ -z "${GROQ_API_KEY:-}" ]; then
  log_error "APIKEY" "GROQ_API_KEY is required to refresh models."
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_NO_API_KEY"
fi
ensure_run_tmpdir || return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
local workdir="" tmpd="" out="" errf="" api_url="" tmp_parsed="" tmp_trim="" tmpout="" rc=0 origin="" lockfile=""
workdir="${RUN_TMPDIR:-}"
[ -n "$workdir" ] || return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
tmpd="$(mktemp -d "$workdir/groq-models.XXXXXX")" || return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
out="$tmpd/models.json"
errf="$tmpd/curl.err"
resolve_provider_url "${PROVIDER:-}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
if [ -n "${BASH4LLM_PROVIDER_URL:-}" ]; then
  origin="$(printf '%s' "$BASH4LLM_PROVIDER_URL" | sed -E 's#(https?://[^/]+).*#\1#')"
  api_url="${origin%/}/openai/v1/models"
else
  log_error "MODELREFRESH" "no provider URL available to refresh models"
  rm -rf "$tmpd"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_API"
fi
rm -f "$out" "$errf" 2>/dev/null || true
if ! curl "${CURL_BASE_OPTS[@]}" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${GROQ_API_KEY}" -H "Content-Type: application/json" "${api_url}?limit=${MAX_MODELS}" -o "$out" 2>"$errf"; then
  log_error "MODELREFRESH" "Failed to fetch models from $api_url"
  if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
    head -n 200 "$errf" >&2 || true
  fi
  rm -rf "$tmpd"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_API"
fi
if ! jq -e . "$out" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log_error "MODELREFRESH" "Invalid JSON received from $api_url"
  if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
    head -n 200 "$errf" >&2 || true
  fi
  rm -rf "$tmpd"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_API"
fi
tmp_parsed="$tmpd/parsed_models.txt"
: > "$tmp_parsed"
jq -r '
  if (has("data") and (.data|type) == "array") then
    .data[]? | (.id // .name // empty)
  elif (type == "array") then
    .[]? | (.id // .name // empty)
  else
    empty
  end
' "$out" | awk 'NF{print}' | sed -E 's/^[[:space:]]+//;s/[[:space:]]+$//' | sort -u > "$tmp_parsed" 2>/dev/null || true
if [ ! -s "$tmp_parsed" ]; then
  log_error "MODELREFRESH" "models refresh: parsed list empty"
  if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
    head -n 200 "$errf" >&2 || true
  fi
  rm -rf "$tmpd"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_API"
fi
tmp_trim="$tmpd/parsed_trimmed.txt"
awk '''{
  g=$0
  sub(/^models\//,"",g)
  sub(/^groq[:\/-]*/,"",g)
  if (g ~ /^[[:alnum:]._\/:-]+$/) print g
}''' "$tmp_parsed" | awk -v M="$MAX_MODELS" '''NR<=M{print}''' > "$tmp_trim" || true
if [ ! -s "$tmp_trim" ]; then
  log_error "MODELREFRESH" "no valid model names after normalization"
  rm -rf "$tmpd"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_API"
fi
safe_mkdir "$(dirname "$MODELS_FILE")" 700
tmpout="$(_mktemp_in_dir "$(dirname "$MODELS_FILE")" 2>/dev/null)" || true
[ -n "$tmpout" ] || tmpout="$(_tmpf file "$(dirname "$MODELS_FILE")" models 2>/dev/null)"
cat "$tmp_trim" > "$tmpout"
if ! b64_atomic_write "${MODELS_FILE}.b64" 10 < "$tmpout"; then
  log_error "MODELREFRESH" "failed to stage models file"
  rm -f "$tmpout" 2>/dev/null || true
  rm -rf "$tmpd"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
lockfile="$MODELS_LOCK"
lock_exec "$lockfile" 10 -- base64 "${B64_DECODE_OPT}" < "${MODELS_FILE}.b64" > "$MODELS_FILE" \
  || { log_error "MODELREFRESH" "failed to write models file under lock"; rm -rf "$tmpd"; return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"; }
chmod 600 "$MODELS_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
log_info_user "MODELREFRESH" "Models refreshed and saved to: $MODELS_FILE (max ${MAX_MODELS})"
[ -n "${tmpout:-}" ] && [ -f "$tmpout" ] && rm -f "$tmpout" 2>/dev/null || true
rm -rf "$tmpd"
return 0

local key="${1:-}"
local url="${BASH4LLM_PROVIDER_URL:-https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/chat/completions}"
local base_url="${url%/chat/completions}"
local api_url="${base_url%/v1}/v1/models"
local http_code="" curl_rc=0
local tmpout="" errf=""
if [ -z "$key" ]; then
  return 1
fi
if type _mktemp_in_dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  tmpout="$(_mktemp_in_dir "$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR" 2>/dev/null || true)"
fi
[ -n "$tmpout" ] || tmpout="$(_tmpf file "$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR" groq-key-diag 2>/dev/null || mktemp "${BASH4LLM_TMPDIR}/groq-key-diag.XXXXXX")"
errf="${tmpout}.err"
http_code="$(curl "${CURL_BASE_OPTS[@]}" --max-time 10 \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $key" \
  -o "$tmpout" \
  -w "%{http_code}" \
  "$api_url" 2>"$errf" || echo "CURL_ERR")"
curl_rc=$?
rm -f "$tmpout" "$errf" 2>/dev/null || true
if [ "$http_code" = "CURL_ERR" ] || [ "$curl_rc" -eq 28 ]; then
  return 28
fi
if [ "$http_code" = "200" ]; then
  return 0
else
  return 1
fi

local file="$MODELS_FILE" line="" norm="" cnt=0
if [ -f "$file" ] && [ -s "$file" ]; then
  relative_mfile="$(canonical_model_file "groq")"
  if [ -f "$relative_mfile" ] && [ -s "$relative_mfile" ]; then
    norm="$(_normalize_model_name "$(head -n1 "$relative_mfile" 2>/dev/null)")"
    if [ -n "$norm" ] && is_supported_model "$norm"; then
      printf '%s' "$norm"
      return 0
    fi
  fi
  while IFS= read -r line || [ -n "$line" ]; do
    [ -z "$line" ] && continue
    cnt=$((cnt+1))
    norm="$(_normalize_model_name "$line")"
    if is_supported_model "$norm"; then
      printf '%s' "$norm"
      return 0
    fi
    [ "$cnt" -ge "$MAX_MODELS" ] && break
  done < "$file"
fi
return 1

blocks.body:
if [ -n "${PROVIDER_API_ENV_groq:-}" ] && declare -p "${PROVIDER_API_ENV_groq}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  custom_key_var="${PROVIDER_API_ENV_groq}"
  GROQ_API_KEY="${!custom_key_var:-}"
fi
